external_id.title: External ID
external_id.note: The stable upstream record id that makes this call idempotent. Pass the same value here you used (or will use) on the corresponding `reconcileBatch` call. Without it, this action cannot detect that an item already exists for this record.

fields.title: Fields
fields.note: Raw Podio item fields payload — same shape as `Item: Create (Dynamic)`. Use external_id-keyed field names or numeric field_ids per Podio's API.

app_id.title: App ID
app_id.note: Optional override. Normally configured in the action's static config; pass here only if routing dynamically.
